Home / Services / Pipe Repair

Pipe Repair

Trenchless solutions and precision fixes for Denver's aging pipes.

From freeze-damaged supply lines in Lakewood to corroded galvanized pipes in Park Hill bungalows, we've mastered pipe repairs that stand up to Colorado's challenges. Our approach minimizes disruption to your home and landscaping while ensuring lasting results.

For common issues like:

- Pinhole leaks in copper pipes (accelerated by Denver's acidic water)
- Frozen burst sections in exterior walls
- Corrosion at joints in older homes
- Earthquake-induced stress fractures

We employ trenchless epoxy lining when possible - a technique that rehabilitates pipes without excavation. For complete replacements, we use materials suited to our environment, like CPVC that won't degrade in our dry climate.

Historic district projects receive special attention - we match existing pipe routes to preserve original layouts and use period-appropriate materials when required by preservation guidelines. Modern homes get upgrades with accessible shutoff valves and earthquake-resistant fittings.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Pressure testing and leak detection
  2. 02 Step 2: Non-invasive diagnosis with pipe cameras
  3. 03 Step 3: Repair method selection with homeowner consultation
  4. 04 Step 4: Precision implementation with minimal disruption

Benefits

  • 75% of repairs completed without excavation
  • Freeze-resistant insulation options
  • Historic preservation compliance
  • 10-year warranty on materials

Frequently Asked Questions

Why do copper pipes fail faster in Denver?

Our low humidity and high altitude accelerate oxidation, while acidic water eats through protective coatings. We install dielectric unions to prevent galvanic corrosion.

Can you repair pipes under concrete slabs?

Yes - we use directional drilling to access pipes without destroying your foundation or flooring, common in Littleton's ranch homes.

Do you handle main water line replacements?

Absolutely - from permit acquisition to final inspection, we manage complete service line renewals with minimal yard disturbance.
